Louisiana is very conservative, BUT making gambling-in-general legal was pitched as a money boon to be dedicated to public education. It was a very big deal, with even teachers approving & pushing the effort.
Now of course, Repubs are not crazy about public ed, so the "dedicated" part has "evolved."

data.body: I have worked so hard for this, Everytime I go in public by myself I literally sing out my car as if I'm Billie Joe singing to a crowd of greenday fans, and I have been doing lots of mychemicalromance and charli xcx lately
data.author: did:plc:hwddvt2sbxnxyt42y5pko64u

data.body: Was at a grocery story and dude stopped me by the butter and eggs and told me "I love your singing" and I immediately thanked him and said "yeah this is what I'm tryna be known for" and now I'm actually becoming a viral sensation in my town
data.author: did:plc:hwddvt2sbxnxyt42y5pko64u

data.body: Here's the thing, I'm used to being recognized online, but being recognized in person IRL just makes me feel famous IRL and this is something I have worked so damn hard for to become this
data.author: did:plc:hwddvt2sbxnxyt42y5pko64u

data.body: I had a lovely woman film me singing the entirety of THE SHARPEST LIVES by mychemicalromance today and this was only the second time I've been filmed by a stranger today, this year I have been filmed at least more than 10 times, it's all about consistency and having CONFIDENCE
data.author: did:plc:hwddvt2sbxnxyt42y5pko64u
